metadata.army_name: Warlord Snagga Snagga’s Feral Ork Horde
metadata.page_title: Warlord Snagga Snagga’s Feral Ork Horde Army List

special_rules.name: Special Rules
special_rules.text: The Mob Rule (see Mob Rule ) and Power of the Waaagh! (see Power of the Waaagh! ) rules apply to all Ork formations.

formations.name: Boarboyz Horde
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of Boarboyz for +25 points each
Add up to one Wyrdboy character to any unit for +50 points

formations.name: Junka Brigade
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of Boyz with a Junkatrukk for +25 points each
Add up to one Nobz with a Junkatrukk for +50 points
Add up to one Wyrdboy character to any unit for +50 points
formations.raw_text: Junka Brigade | Six Boyz and six Junkatrukks | 175 | 300 | n/a

formations.name: 0–1 Madboyz Horde
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add up to six Madboyz for +15 points each
Add up to three Wyrdboy characters to any unit(s) for +50 points each
formations.raw_text: 0–1 Madboyz Horde | Six Madboyz | 100 | n/a | n/a

formations.name: Trappas
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add up to one Nobz for +35 points
Note: All units in the formation have Scout

formations.name: Warband
formations.units_text: Two Nobz, six Boyz and two Grotz
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of the following units for +25 points each: Boarboyz, Boyz with an optional Grotz, two Wildboyz
Add any number of Squiggoths for +50 points each
Add up to three Squig Katapults for +25 points each
Add up to one Nobz for +35 points
Add up to one Wyrdboy character to any unit for +50 points
Add up to one Orkeosaurus for +175 points
formations.raw_text: Warband | Two Nobz, six Boyz and two Grotz | 200 | 350 | 500

formations.name: Wildboyz
formations.restrictions_or_notes:
Add any number of the following units for +25 points each: Boarboyz, two Wildboyz
Add any number of Squiggoths for +50 points each
Add up to three Squig Katapults for +25 points each
Add up to one Nobz for +35 points
Add up to one Wyrdboy character to any unit for +50 points
Add up to one Orkeosaurus for +175 points
formations.raw_text: Wildboyz | Two Nobz and six Wildboyz | 125 | 225 | 325

profiles.name: Grotz
abilities_or_notes: Formations that include at least one Ork unit don't count Grot units that are lost in an assault when working out who has won the combat.

profiles.name: Junkatrukk
abilities_or_notes: May transport one of the following units: Boyz, Grotz, Nobz. Transported units do not have to disembark in order to shoot or use their firefight value if this unit is able to shoot, assault or lend support.

profiles.name: Squiggoth
abilities_or_notes: May transport four of the following units: Boyz, Grotz, Nobz, Wildboyz; plus two units of Grotz.

profiles.name: Orkeosaurus
abilities_or_notes: May Transport twelve of the following units: Boyz, Grotz, Nobz, Wildboyz; plus six units of Grotz). Critical Hit Effect: The unit takes a point of damage and moves 3D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain it stops and is destroyed. If it moves into another unit or units, it stops and one of those units suffers a macro-weapon hit.
parse_warnings: Boolean weapon line folded into previous weapon for Orkeosaurus.

profiles.name: Steam Gargant
abilities_or_notes: Armed with any two of the following weapons: Soopagun, Mega-Choppa. Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed. All units within 2D6cm suffer a hit.

army_notes.name: Using The Army List
army_notes.text:
Unlike the very rigid formations used by the Imperium, Ork formations vary widely in both size and composition. The rules for creating Ork formations reflect this. The different types of Ork formations you may choose are shown on the army list that follows. The army list includes the following information:
Type
The name of the formation.
Core Units
The units that make up the formation. An Ork player can choose to double or triple the number of units in the formation if he wishes. A formation with double the normal number of units is called a big formation, and a formation with three times the normal number of units is called a ’uge formation.
Cost
Most Ork formations have three values. The first value is the cost for the basic formation, the second is its cost if it is a big formation, and the third value is its cost if it is a ’uge formation. If the formation only has one cost then it may not be increased in size. Up to one third of the points available to an Ork army can be spent on aircraft and Gargants.
Extra Units
An Ork formation may include any of the extra units listed in the Extras column. You may include any number of extra units in a formation unless it is specifically noted otherwise. If there is a limitation then the limit is doubled for a big formation and tripled for a ’uge formation. All of the core, extra, and free units in an Ork formation count as being part of one large formation. The different units may not move off on their own.
